title: Agent Contract
description: Every specialist agent implements this contract shape. Uniformity enables plug-in extensibility without orchestrator changes. Reference: RA Section 6.

agent_id.description: Stable identity used in registry lookups and audit records.

items.description: Capability tags matched by Agent Selector.

input_schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema for the context packet this agent expects (Task Schema context field).

output_schema.description: Reference to the JSON Schema for the result this agent publishes to the Event Bus.

items.description: Tool capability tags resolved via Tool Registry before execution.

cost_class.description: Default hint to the Model Router. Overridable per task.

approval_required.description: Whether this agent's output must pass a Human Approval Checkpoint before the next state transition.

idempotency_key_strategy.description: Strategy for ensuring retried invocations do not duplicate side effects.

contract_version.description: Platform Agent Contract version this agent was built against.
